automation_sources.Mosquito Alert: public dataset/data portal; to be rebuilt by scripts/build_mosquito_alert_layers.py
automation_sources.VectorNet/GBIF: GBIF occurrence dataset; to be rebuilt by scripts/build_vectornet_gbif_layers.py
automation_sources.ESCCAP: CSV-only curated/authorized; no auto-scraping by default

notes: territorial layers are context data, not disease diagnoses
Mosquito Alert and VectorNet scripts should be run by GitHub Actions or backend endpoints already added in previous patches
ESCCAP is kept CSV-only until terms/authorization are verified
